segments.text: Out of shield up B to counter!
segments.original_text: ガーキャン上Bで反撃して

segments.text: If he doesn't secure the KO
segments.original_text: このまま撃墜しないと

segments.text: because each hit does insane damage
segments.original_text: なぜなら一発の火力が非常に強力

full_text: Out of shield up B to counter! If he doesn't secure the KO for Simon that's bad because each hit does insane damage in this situation

corrections.original: ガーギャンウェビで反撃して
corrections.corrected: ガーキャン上Bで反撃して
